nodes._comment: NODE 1: Checkpoint Loader - Loads the base SD 1.5 model. Use Anything V5 Ink or Counterfeit V3 for manga/comic style. Keep to SD 1.5 variants only to stay under VRAM limits.

widgets_values: masterpiece, best quality, comic book panel, manga style, black and white ink drawing, clean lineart, halftone shading, detailed background, 1girl standing in rain, dramatic lighting, cinematic composition, professional comic art
nodes._comment: NODE 2: Positive Prompt - Encodes the text prompt into CLIP embeddings. The comic-style keywords (ink drawing, lineart, halftone) guide the model toward comic aesthetics. Edit this per-panel.

widgets_values: lowres, bad anatomy, bad hands, text, error, missing fingers, extra digit, fewer digits, cropped, worst quality, low quality, normal quality, jpeg artifacts, signature, watermark, username, blurry, colored, photorealistic, 3d render
nodes._comment: NODE 3: Negative Prompt - Tells the model what to avoid. 'colored' and 'photorealistic' push output toward B&W ink. '3d render' prevents 3D-looking output.
NODE 4: Empty Latent Image - Creates the initial noise tensor. 512x512 is the sweet spot for SD 1.5 on limited VRAM. Batch size 1 to keep memory low; we generate panels sequentially.

NODE 5: KSampler - The core diffusion sampler. Settings optimized for speed on DirectML: (1) dpmpp_2m_karras: fast convergence, good quality at 20 steps. (2) 20 steps: good balance — fewer steps = faster but lower quality. (3) CFG 7.5: standard guidance scale. (4) Fixed seed (42) for reproducibility across panels.
NODE 6: VAE Decode - Converts latent tensor back to pixel space. Uses the checkpoint's built-in VAE. If you get black images, try loading a separate VAE (e.g., sd-vae-ft-mse).
NODE 7: Image Sharpen - Sharpens ink lines for a crisper comic look. Sigma 1, strength 0.5 is subtle; increase strength for bolder lines.
NODE 8: Save Image - Saves the final panel. Filename prefix 'comic_panel' produces comic_panel_00001.png, etc. Output goes to ComfyUI/output/.
NODE 9: Preview Image - Shows the raw output in the ComfyUI UI before sharpening. Useful for comparing pre/post processing.

extra.workflow_description: Comic Strip Generator — Base workflow for single panel generation on AMD DirectML. Generates 512x512 B&W ink/manga style panels using SD 1.5 with DPM++ 2M Karras sampler at 20 steps. Optimized for ASUS ROG Ally Z1/Z1 Extreme with <=5GB VRAM usage.
